identity.canonical_title: Extended Phase Space for Magneto-Acoustic--Kaluza--Klein Systems

theory.canonical_statement: The configuration manifold for coupled magneto-acoustic and compactified extra-dimensional modes is M=prodm=0infinity(T*SO(3)x R3otimesHmKK)/GgaugeM = prod\_/\{m=0/\}textsuperscript\{/\{infinity/\}(T\}*SO(3) x mathbb/\{R/\}\textasciicircum{}3 textbackslash otimes H/\textasciicircum{}\{\}/\{KK/\}\_m)/G\_/\{text/\{gauge/\}/\}M=prodm=0infinity(T*SO(3)x R3otimesHmKK)/Ggauge, where HmKKH/\textasciicircum{}\{\}/\{KK/\}\_mHmKK denotes the mmmth Kaluza--Klein sector Hilbert space and Ggauge=/\{phi:R3rightarrowU(1) mid nabla2phi=0/\}G\_/\{text/\{gauge/\}/\} = textbackslash/\{phi : mathbb/\{R/\}\textasciicircum{}3 -> U(1)textbackslash,|textbackslash,nabla\textasciicircum{}2phi=0textbackslash/\}Ggauge=/\{phi:R3rightarrowU(1)midnabla2phi=0/\} fixes gauge freedom.
theory.technical_interpretation: The configuration manifold for coupled magneto-acoustic and compactified extra-dimensional modes is M=prodm=0infinity(T*SO(3)x R3otimesHmKK)/GgaugeM = prod\_/\{m=0/\}textsuperscript\{/\{infinity/\}(T\}*SO(3) x mathbb/\{R/\}\textasciicircum{}3 textbackslash otimes H/\textasciicircum{}\{\}/\{KK/\}\_m)/G\_/\{text/\{gauge/\}/\}M=prodm=0infinity(T*SO(3)x R3otimesHmKK)/Ggauge, where HmKKH/\textasciicircum{}\{\}/\{KK/\}\_mHmKK denotes the mmmth Kaluza--Klein sector Hilbert space and Ggauge=/\{phi:R3rightarrowU(1) mid nabla2phi=0/\}G\_/\{text/\{gauge/\}/\} = textbackslash/\{phi : mathbb/\{R/\}\textasciicircum{}3 -> U(1)textbackslash,|textbackslash,nabla\textasciicircum{}2phi=0textbackslash/\}Ggauge=/\{phi:R3rightarrowU(1)midnabla2phi=0/\} fixes gauge freedom.

equation_progression.interpretive_role: This fixes the full extended configuration manifold for the coupled magneto-acoustic and Kaluza--Klein sectors.
This identifies the direct-sum Hilbert carrier built from the admissible compactification modes.
This closes the entry by quotienting the phase space by the harmonic gauge freedom.
